NEMDE:NemPriceSetter.anomaly_note:
Filename casing is 'NemPriceSetter' (mixed case), NOT 'NEMPriceSetter'.
NEMWEB is case-sensitive — do not normalize. Extension is .zip containing XML,
not .xml directly.

FCAS_Causer_Pays:CAUSER_PAYS.anomaly_note:
Frozen archive — only 2011 and 2012 files present as of 2026-04-18.
Filename is literally {year}.txt (e.g., 2011.txt), no 'CAUSER_PAYS_' prefix,
extension is .txt not .zip.

Reports:NEXT_DAY_OFFER_ENERGY)SPARSE.anomaly_note:
Directory-level anomaly: AEMO published this stream with a malformed ')' in the name
and the directory contains zero files. URL is correct as stated — do NOT URL-encode
the ')' character. Entry exists for catalog completeness; do not expect file resolution.
resolve() will raise UnresolvableDatasetError.
